about.title: More than Rugs, a Social Project
about.description1: Alfombrados was born as a social project with a clear mission: to combine the art of tufting with community impact. Every rug we create not only decorates a space, but generates learning and employment opportunities for people in our community.
about.description2: We believe that manual art has the power to transform lives. That's why we teach, create, and share this passion with everyone who wants to learn. From our workshops to every custom piece, we seek to leave a positive footprint.

reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: The satisfaction of those who trust us is our best introduction

review1.text: The quality of the rug they made for me is incredible. The design turned out exactly as I imagined and the process was super easy. Plus, knowing you're supporting a social project makes it even more worthwhile.
review1.name: María González

review2.text: I took the basic tufting course and it was a transformative experience. The instructors are very patient and the atmosphere is great. I'm already making my own rugs at home.
review2.name: Carlos Mendoza

review3.text: I've been buying materials here for months. The yarn quality is excellent and the prices are very competitive. Shipping always arrives on time.
review3.name: Ana Rodríguez

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your information and browsing data
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide directly when making a purchase, requesting a quote, or contacting us. This includes: full name, email address, phone number, and shipping address. We also automatically collect certain browsing information when you visit our site.
privacy.section2Body: We use essential cookies for the site to function (cart session, language and currency preferences). We do not use third-party advertising tracking cookies. The cookies we use are:
privacy.cookie1Desc: Saves products in your cart while you browse. Expires when the browser is closed.
privacy.cookie2Desc: Remembers whether you prefer the site in Spanish or English. Duration: 1 year.
privacy.cookie3Desc: Remembers whether you prefer to see prices in USD or VES. Duration: 1 year.
privacy.section3Body: We use your information exclusively to: process and deliver your orders, communicate with you about your purchase via WhatsApp or email, improve our products and services, and comply with applicable legal obligations.
privacy.section4Body: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes. We only share data with service providers necessary to complete your order (such as shipping services), and only the strictly necessary information.
privacy.section5Body: You have the right to: access your personal data, request its correction or deletion, and object to its processing. To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp or at the email indicated below.
privacy.section6Body: For any questions about this privacy policy, contact us:

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use for the Alfombra2 platform and services
terms.section1Body: By accessing and using the Alfombra2 website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Body: Alfombra2 offers custom handcrafted rugs, tufting materials, and specialized courses. All products are subject to availability. Images are for reference; colors may vary slightly due to screen settings and the handcrafted process.
terms.section3Body: Prices are expressed in US dollars (USD). We accept payments via Binance Pay, PayPal, Zelle, bank transfer, and Pago Móvil (Venezuela). Prices may change without notice. The valid price is the one in effect at the time the order is confirmed.
terms.section4Body: Orders are confirmed once payment is verified. For Venezuela, estimated delivery time is 3 to 7 business days. For international shipments, time varies by destination. Alfombra2 is not responsible for delays caused by shipping companies or customs.
terms.section5Body: We accept returns within 7 days of receiving the product, provided the item is in its original, unused condition. Custom rugs are not eligible for return except in case of manufacturing defect. To initiate a return, contact us via WhatsApp.
terms.section6Body: All site content (images, designs, logos, texts) is the property of Alfombra2 and is protected by copyright. Reproduction or use without written authorization is prohibited.
terms.section7Body: Alfombra2 will not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the site or products. Our maximum liability is limited to the value of the corresponding order.
terms.section8Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this site. We recommend reviewing them periodically.
terms.section9Body: For any questions about these terms, contact us:

shippingPolicy.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPolicy.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how we ship your orders
shippingPolicy.section1Body: We ship throughout Venezuela. We work with the country's main courier companies. Estimated delivery time is 3 to 7 business days from payment confirmation.
shippingPolicy.section2Body: We ship worldwide. International delivery time varies between 7 and 21 business days depending on the destination country. International shipping costs are calculated based on weight, package dimensions, and destination.
shippingPolicy.section3Body: Shipping costs are calculated during checkout based on your location. For Venezuela, the base cost may vary by state. International shipments include basic package insurance.
shippingPolicy.section4Body: Once payment is confirmed, your order enters the preparation process. Material orders are dispatched within 1-2 business days. Custom rugs require 5 to 15 business days of production before shipping.
shippingPolicy.section5Body: Once your order is dispatched, you will receive the tracking number via WhatsApp to track your shipment. You can also contact us directly via WhatsApp for order status updates.
shippingPolicy.section6Body: If you receive a damaged product, contact us within 48 hours of receipt with photos of the damage. We will manage the replacement or refund as appropriate. In case of package loss, we will open an investigation with the shipping company.
shippingPolicy.section7Body: Contact us via WhatsApp if you have questions about coverage in your specific area within Venezuela. For international shipments, we cover virtually all destinations with access to courier services.

socialImpact.title: Social Impact
socialImpact.subtitle: Discover the mission behind every rug
socialImpact.heroTitle: More than a Store, a Life Project
socialImpact.heroDesc: Alfombra2 was born in San Antonio de los Altos, Venezuela, with a clear vision: to prove that handcraft art can drive social and economic transformation for an entire community.
socialImpact.missionBody: We combine the art of tufting with a circular economy business model that creates real opportunities for people in our community. Every purchase you make is not just a transaction: you become a direct sponsor of a social project that transforms lives.
socialImpact.circularTitle: How Does the Circular Economy Work?
socialImpact.circular1Desc: You purchase a rug, materials, or a course from Alfombra2.
socialImpact.circular2Desc: Part of every sale funds the training and payment of community artisans.
socialImpact.circular3Desc: Trained artisans teach others, multiplying impact at no additional cost.
socialImpact.circular4Desc: The surplus is reinvested in materials, infrastructure, and new community opportunities.
socialImpact.sponsorsBody: Everyone who buys from Alfombra2 automatically becomes a direct project sponsor. It's not philanthropy: it's a fair exchange where you get a quality product and the community receives a real development opportunity.
socialImpact.communityBody: San Antonio de los Altos is our home and our reason for being. This municipality in Miranda state, Venezuela, is the epicenter of Alfombra2. Here we train, produce, and dream. Here the idea was born that a tufting needle can change a life.
socialImpact.value1Desc: Every piece we create has a human story behind it and a measurable impact on the community.
socialImpact.value2Desc: We offer workshops and courses at accessible prices so anyone can learn tufting.
socialImpact.value3Desc: We pay fair prices to our artisans and reinvest in the community transparently.
socialImpact.value4Desc: We seek to minimize waste and maximize the use of every material used.
socialImpact.ctaBody: Buying from Alfombra2 is the most direct way to support a community circular economy in Venezuela. Every rug, every ball of yarn, every course is a step toward a fairer future.
